hero.title: Creating Digital Experience That Drive Growth
hero.description: HostingPro delivers enterprise-ready performance with built-in security, performance monitoring, and automatic platform maintenance—saving companies engineering time and resources. Get the enterprise managed hosting platform trusted by global brands.

items.title: One, holistic solution
items.description: Reduces your time spent integrating multiple vendors in your tech stack, saves you money, and allows you to spend more time innovating.

items.title: Node.js frontend
items.description: Unlock new opportunities with higher-budget projects. Build with your choice of modern front-end JavaScript framework.

items.title: High-performance hosting
items.description: Achieve up to 10x performance with global CDN, the fastest TTFB scores, and smart scaling and auto-healing Node hosting.

items.title: Robust CMS
items.description: Reduce your clients' learning curve, give your dev team more flexibility, and save on sunk costs compared to other enterprise CMSs.

items.title: Platform blueprints
items.description: Jump-start your projects with pre-configured environments, templates, and demo content to quickly learn.

items.title: GraphQL API
items.description: Optionally enable a GraphQL API to render pages and content on your frontend and query your data with enhanced clarity.

items.title: Content modeling
items.description: Model your data structure and editing experience while empowering both content creators and developers.

items.title: Developer toolkit
items.description: An optional, server-first based toolkit for bringing common features like previews and page templates hierarchy to your project.

items.title: Smart Search
items.description: Deliver a smarter, faster, and easier way to enable headless search with minimal configuration and an intuitive UI.

services.title: High-Impact Services To Help Your Business

items.title: Business Website Development
items.description: Professional websites that drive results. Custom solutions tailored to your brand and business goals.

items.title: Full-Stack Web Applications
items.description: Complete solutions from frontend to backend. Scalable applications built with modern frameworks.

items.title: Web Designing (UI/UX)
items.description: User-focused designs that look great and convert. Clean interfaces built with modern design tools.

items.title: Custom Dashboard & Admin Panels
items.description: Data-driven dashboards and admin panels. Real-time analytics, charts, and controls tailored to your workflow.

items.title: API & Backend Development
items.description: Secure, scalable APIs and backend systems. Authentication, data handling, and integrations built for reliability.

items.title: Ecommerce Website Development
items.description: Online stores that sell. Custom shop on Shopify, WooCommerce, and secure checkout with Stripe and PayPal.

partners.title: Our integrated partners
partners.description: Leverage the flexibility of open source and best-of-breed technology. We provide ecosystem integration with partners across the martech stack.

process.title: Agile Course Of Action
process.description: From Web Design & Development through to Digital Marketing. We'll increase traffic by 50%, generate more leads and boost sales.

integrations.title: Speed Up Your Workflow With Our Integrations
integrations.description: From web design & development through to digital marketing. We'll increase traffic by 50%, generate more leads and boost sales.

clients.title: Our Happy Clients
clients.description: Our dedication to quality and client satisfaction has made it possible for us to work with companies in an array of industries. Our valued clients who have trusted us are mentioned below.

ctaBanner.title: Schedule Your Free 30-Minute Growth Call Today

ourWork.title: Our Work
ourWork.description: Explore some of our recent projects below. Over the past 10 years, we've been fortunate to work with incredible clients and partners, creating sleek designs that are both time and cost-effective.

servicesOverview.title: Services
servicesOverview.description: We offer everything you need to build, enhance, and maintain a successful brand. Each service is tailored to help you stand out in the digital world and achieve long-term success.

content.title: Website Maintenance and Support Services
content.description: We provide maintenance and expert support to ensure your website runs efficiently, securely, and continuously evolves with your business.
content.featuresTitle: Our Maintenance and Support Service Includes

features.title: Software Updates
features.description: Keep your site up-to-date with the latest software and plugins to ensure compatibility and security.

features.title: Security Monitoring
features.description: We protect your site against threats and vulnerabilities with continuous monitoring and rapid response to security incidents.

features.title: Performance Optimization
features.description: We fine-tune site speed and database efficiency for optimal performance.

features.title: Regular Backups
features.description: We perform regular backups to protect your data and facilitate recovery in case of loss.

features.title: Technical Consulting
features.description: We provide expert advice to improve your web presence and ensure that your site meets your business goals.

features.title: Technical Support
features.description: We resolve bugs and issues quickly keeping your business online and running smoothly.

features.title: Implementation of New Features
features.description: As your needs evolve, we implement new features to enhance your site's capabilities and user experience.
